jobDescription: This is Adyen Speed is the foundation of our company. We think fast. We work fast. We launch fast. We put our merchants at the center of everything we do, and we never stop until the job is done. We’re creating our own path, with a global team driving sustainable growth. We don’t do hierarchy, egos or boundaries. “ Not possible” is not in our vocabulary — “freedom” is. This is who we are: honest, direct and always bringing an element of fun into our work. If you’re ready to join the power of fast, keep reading. Business Analyst Acquiring Our Global Acquiring team is continuously adding new markets for card acceptance, optimizing card payment performance in our existing markets and adding new payment methods to further grow our business. As a new addition to this team we need you to contribute to our growth by implementing the latest payment products and specification, and by optimizing our continuously growing payments volume. What you’ll do Support implementation of new markets and payment methods Optimize payment processing quality for the benefit of our full client base Continuously pushing operational excellence in our daily operations. Provide our Sales and AM teams with relevant insights to close deals or drive new volume within existing markets. Who you are Academic background, preferably quantitative (engineering, econometrics, etc) You’re familiar with data analysis languages such as Spark, R, Python or Matlab Experience with card present and card not present payments Enthusiastic to solve complex problems in a structured manner. Committed to structurally approach technical or financial issues and take ownership Excellent in communication of complex data or technical functionality with commercial or client teams Who we are Adyen is the payments platform of choice for the world's leading companies, delivering frictionless payments across online, mobile and in-store channels. It is the only provider of a modern end-to-end infrastructure, connecting directly to Visa, Mastercard, and consumers' globally preferred payment methods. With offices around the world, Adyen serves nine of the 10 largest U. S. internet companies and many worldwide retailers. Customers include Facebook, Uber, L' Oreal, Casper, Bonobos, and Spotify.
